entries.title: Company Overview
entries.content: SunPower Solar UK is a family-run solar installation company based in Croydon, South London. Founded in 2019 by James and Sarah Wilson. Over 2,000 installations completed. MCS certified, Which? Trusted Traders approved, RECC members. Team of 12 certified installers.

entries.title: Core Services
entries.content: 1. Residential solar panel installation (3kW to 12kW systems). 2. Commercial solar installation (up to 100kW). 3. Battery storage installation. 4. EV charger installation. 5. Solar panel maintenance and cleaning. 6. Free solar survey and quote. 7. Roof assessment for solar suitability.

entries.title: Service Areas
entries.content: Greater London (all boroughs), Surrey, Kent, Essex, Hertfordshire, Berkshire, Sussex. We travel up to 50 miles from our Croydon base. Free surveys for all areas.

entries.title: Business Hours
entries.content: Monday to Friday 8am to 6pm. Saturday 9am to 2pm. Sunday closed. Emergency line available 24/7 at 0800 123 4567. Bank holidays: closed except emergency line.

entries.title: Pricing Overview
entries.content: Free solar survey and quote. Residential systems from 5000 pounds (3kW) to 14000 pounds (12kW). Battery storage from 3000 pounds. EV chargers from 800 pounds. Commercial projects quoted individually. Finance available from 0% APR over 12 months.

entries.title: Booking Policy
entries.content: Free surveys can be booked same-week. Installation typically scheduled 2-4 weeks after quote acceptance. 500 pound deposit required to secure installation date. Balance due on completion. We accept bank transfer, credit card, and finance.

entries.title: Solar Panel Products - Residential
entries.content: We offer three tiers: BUDGET - Longi Hi-MO 6 (410W, 21% efficiency, 25yr warranty, from 5000 for 3kW). STANDARD - Jinko Tiger Neo N-type (420W, 21.8% efficiency, 30yr warranty, from 6500 for 3kW). PREMIUM - SunPower Maxeon 7 (440W, 22.8% efficiency, 40yr warranty, from 8500 for 3kW).

entries.title: Inverter Options
entries.content: String Inverters: SolarEdge SE3000H to SE10000H (97.5% efficiency, 12yr warranty extendable to 25). Micro-inverters: Enphase IQ8+ (panel-level optimization, 25yr warranty, best for shading). Hybrid: GivEnergy Gen3 (battery-ready, 5-8kW, 10yr warranty). We recommend SolarEdge for standard and Enphase for shaded roofs.

entries.title: Battery Storage Products
entries.content: Tesla Powerwall 2: 13.5kWh, 5kW output, 8500 installed, 10yr warranty. GivEnergy All-in-One 9.5: 9.5kWh, hybrid inverter included, 5500 installed, 12yr warranty. SolarEdge Home Battery 10: 10kWh, pairs with SolarEdge inverter, 6000 installed, 10yr warranty. Fox ESS ECS4100: 4kWh stackable to 24kWh, from 3000, 10yr warranty.

entries.title: EV Charger Products
entries.content: Zappi V2: 7kW, smart solar divert (uses excess solar for EV), 1100 installed. Tesla Wall Connector Gen3: 7-22kW, 800-1200 installed. Ohme Home Pro: 7kW, charges when electricity cheapest, 950 installed. Andersen A2: 7kW, premium wood finish, 1400 installed. All OZEV grant eligible (350 off). We are OZEV approved.

entries.title: Installation Process
entries.content: Step 1: FREE SURVEY (30 min) - assess roof, shading, electrics, drone photos if needed. Step 2: QUOTE (within 24hrs) - system design, generation forecast, savings calc, ROI. Step 3: ACCEPT - sign quote, pay 500 deposit, install booked 2-4 weeks. Step 4: INSTALL (1-2 days) - MCS certified team, scaffolding, dust sheets. Step 5: CONNECT - wired to consumer unit, generation meter fitted. Step 6: DNO NOTIFICATION - we handle it. Step 7: HANDOVER - MCS cert, monitoring app, walkthrough, maintenance guide.

entries.title: Commercial Installation
entries.content: Additional steps for commercial: structural engineer assessment, energy audit, planning check. Design includes 3D modeling, electrical schematic, grid connection application. Install takes 3-10 days. We handle G99 grid connection for systems over 16A per phase. Requires Part P certification and Building Regs compliance.

entries.title: Roof Types
entries.content: SLATE: hooks under slates, no drilling. CONCRETE TILES: tile hooks, very common. CLAY TILES: specialist hooks, may need trimming. FLAT ROOFS: ballasted frames at 10-15 degree tilt, EPDM protected. METAL: standing seam clamps or self-drilling brackets. THATCHED: not suitable. ASBESTOS: needs remediation first. LISTED BUILDINGS: may need planning permission, we handle the application.

entries.title: Warranties
entries.content: WORKMANSHIP: 10 years (installation, roof, wiring). PANELS: 25-40 years (linear degradation guarantee). INVERTER: 10-25 years depending on model. BATTERY: 10-12 years or 10,000 cycles. ROOF DAMAGE: free repair for 10 years if we cause damage. MCS CERT: lifetime validity, needed for SEG. INSURANCE-BACKED: through RECC, covers you if we cease trading.

entries.title: Finance Options
entries.content: 0% FINANCE: 12 months through Kanda. Example: 8000 system = 667/month. LOW-RATE: 3.9% APR over 5/7/10 years. Example: 8000 over 10 years = 80/month. BUY NOW PAY LATER: Klarna for orders under 2000 (EV chargers). 3 interest-free payments. Min spend 1500. Credit check required. Apply at survey.

entries.title: Smart Export Guarantee
entries.content: SEG pays you for exported electricity. Rates: Octopus Flux 15p/kWh (best, needs Octopus tariff), British Gas 6.4p/kWh, EDF 4.1p/kWh, EON 3.5p/kWh. Need: MCS cert + smart meter + system under 5MW. Average 3kW exports 1500kWh/year = 90-225/year. Combined with savings, ROI is 7-10 years.

entries.title: Maintenance
entries.content: ANNUAL SERVICE: 150/year - inspection, generation check, inverter diagnostics, cleaning if needed. PANEL CLEANING: 100 for up to 16 panels, every 2-3 years. FAULT DIAGNOSIS: free remote check, 75 on-site if outside warranty. BIRD PROOFING: 400-600 mesh barrier. MONITORING: free MyEnergy app, real-time data, we proactively contact you on faults.

entries.title: Technical FAQ
entries.content: North-facing roof? Gets 50-60% less, usually not recommended unless combined with east/west. Roof space needed? About 2 sqm per panel, 4kW system (10 panels) needs 20 sqm. Cloudy weather? Yes panels work, UK produces about 65% of rated output annually. Panel lifespan? 25-40 years, 0.5% degradation per year, 85%+ output after 25 years. Planning permission? Usually no for residential, exceptions for listed buildings and conservation areas. Hail? Panels tested to 25mm hailstones at 80km/h.

entries.title: Financial FAQ
entries.content: Savings? Typical 4kW saves 800-1100/year. Payback? 7-10 years standard, less with battery. Property value? 4-14% increase, faster sales. Government grant? No direct solar grant, SEG is main incentive, OZEV 350 for EV chargers. Moving house? Panels stay, warranties transfer. Add battery later? Yes with hybrid inverter, we retrofit regularly.

entries.title: Why Choose Us Over Competitors
entries.content: vs IKEA SOLAR: more panel choices, longer warranties, local aftercare. vs BRITISH GAS: 15-20% cheaper, more flexible finance. vs LOCAL INSTALLERS: MCS certified, Which? approved, insurance-backed guarantees. vs GREEN ENERGY TOGETHER: we match their prices, faster install, more product choice.
